# Stray Web Design

> Premium web design agency building fast, accessible, AI-ready websites for small businesses.

## About

Stray Web Design builds custom, high-performance websites for small businesses. We replace slow, outdated WordPress sites with modern, blazing-fast alternatives that score 95-100 on Google Lighthouse across all categories: Performance, Accessibility, Best Practices, and SEO.

## Services

- **Performance-First Websites**: Sub-1-second load times, Core Web Vitals optimized, global CDN delivery
- **Accessibility Built In**: WCAG AA compliant, keyboard navigable, screen reader tested
- **AI & LLM Ready**: Structured data (JSON-LD), FAQ schema, llms.txt for AI assistant discoverability
- **Responsive Design**: Mobile-first, touch-optimized, fluid typography

## Technology Stack

- Next.js (React framework)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion (animations)
- Vercel (hosting & CDN)

## Why Not WordPress?

WordPress powers 43% of the web, but its plugin-heavy architecture leads to:
- Slow page loads (4-8 seconds average)
- Security vulnerabilities from outdated plugins
- Poor Core Web Vitals scores
- No native AI/LLM optimization
- Ongoing maintenance burden

Our custom-built sites eliminate all of these problems with zero plugins, zero maintenance, and perfect Lighthouse scores.

## Pricing

- Standard business sites start at $2,500
- Premium sites with advanced animations and integrations start at $5,000
- Every project includes a free site audit

## Contact

- Website: https://straywebdesign.co
- Email: tom@straywebdesign.co

## Key Differentiators

1. **Lighthouse 100s**: We target perfect scores across all categories
2. **GEO Optimized**: Generative Engine Optimization for AI assistant visibility
3. **Zero Maintenance**: No plugins to update, no databases to manage
4. **Custom Design**: Never templates — every site is designed from scratch
5. **Modern Stack**: React, TypeScript, edge deployment — built for 2025 and beyond
